review.correctedByline: By GREG MEACHEM of The Advocate
review.correctedDescriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Red Deer Rustlers 9-1 in Game 7 of the Western Canada Centennial Cup semifinal series.
review.correctedDescriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes eliminated the Red Deer Rustlers with a lopsided 9-1 victory in the seventh and final game of the Western Canada Centennial Cup semifinal series on Thursday night. There were tears in the Rustlers' dressing room after the loss, according to reporter Greg Meachem of The Advocate.
